title: Automation-First Product Goal Roadmap
description: Keep architecture readiness and user experience readiness dynamically aligned until ZAgenticLoop delivers automation-first loops.

1.label: Automation-First Product Goal Roadmap

decisions.q: 架构目标与用户体验目标是否二选一？
decisions.answer: 两者必须同时满足，并在项目演进中动态保持一致。架构目标先进时应拉动用户体验补齐；用户体验落后时应作为稳定参考对象反向打磨架构确定性。
decisions.note: 参考动态规划思路：每个阶段都维护局部最优与全局目标的一致性，避免架构漂亮但体验不顺，或体验承诺超过架构事实。

decisions.q: 路线图应如何切成可执行 slices？
decisions.answer: 按同一真相面、核心派生、自动推进与Workspace、GitHub/GitLab适配、确定性gate/replay、reference dogfood/release 六条依赖线切分；每个叶子必须有明确接口、测试或dogfood证据，不能把中间报告误作完成。
decisions.note: 先完成可表达并可判定的 completion contract，后续 adapter 与用户体验工作才有共同完成标准。

1.notes: 先完成 1-1 的 completion contract；1-2 迁移并基线化当前事实；1-3 与 1-4 可在 contract 稳定后并行；1-5、1-6、1-7 依次收口 adapter、gates 和 release evidence。

1-1.label: Completion Alignment Ledger 与不可补偿完成硬门

decisions.q: 完成标准应该按架构目标还是用户体验目标？
decisions.answer: 两者同时作为 hard completion criteria：架构上必须有 Route Table truth、runner/preflight/replay/gate 证据；体验上必须能从用户信号自动推进到 review artifact 或结构化 hard stop，且用户不需要在多个位置反复猜下一步。
decisions.note: 这是动态对齐评分，不是二选一。A 先进时拉 B，B 落后时约束 A 的宣称。

decisions.q: 完成度是否允许加权评分抵消硬缺口？
decisions.answer: 不允许。以 Completion Alignment Ledger 替代评分；Architecture Integrity、live capability、stop/recovery、experience continuity、automatic progression 与 verification 均为不可补偿硬门。
decisions.note: 旧的评分措辞正式废弃；历史决策保留其被替换原因。

1-1.notes: 顺序：1-1-1 已完成 durable design；1-1-2 定义同一 Route Table 结构；1-1-3 派生 core ledger；1-1-4 暴露 doctor；1-1-5 固化兼容性回归。

1-2.label: 当前 Route 能力与用户体验缺口盘点

decisions.q: 当前是否已经完成 value-oriented 产品目标？
decisions.answer: 尚未完成。当前已建立 automation-first 架构主线和若干 dogfooded/live 链路，但多数 route 仍停留在 report-only/request-only/claim-only/dry-run，GitLab 多数能力仍为 dry-run-supported，用户体验仍存在确认、切换、消费动作偏多的问题。
decisions.note: 盘点必须以 Route Table 为事实源，不能用过程 roadmap 或口头结论替代当前能力真相。

1-2.notes: 依赖 1-1-2 与 1-1-3。只迁移/派生当前事实，不以手工报告替代 Route Table 或 ledger。

1-3.label: 默认自动执行到 review artifact 或 hard stop

decisions.q: 自动化默认应该执行到哪里？
decisions.answer: 默认执行到当前 route 的第一个 review artifact 或 hard stop signal。不能一步一停，也不能无边界循环；route 必须声明 bounded work、verification evidence、review artifact 和 stop conditions。
decisions.note: 这直接承接 value-oriented 原则中的 end-to-end loop 体验。

decisions.q: Workspace Adapter 的完成是否可由单一 no-provider fixture 证明？
decisions.answer: 不能。fixture 只证明协议；Workspace 必须分别证明 local carrier/review/closeout runtime，以及 control、repair、draft、roadmap 等适用 route family 的真实 Git workspace 成功与 recovery evidence。
decisions.note: issue 与 PR/MR 语义仍为 not-applicable-with-reason，不应伪造 local tracker 或 local PR。

1-3.notes: 依赖 1-1 completion contract。Workspace 是 provider:none 的 adapter，不伪造 issue 或 PR；每个叶子需真实 Git workspace evidence。

1-4.label: 结构化 stop signal 与 human handoff 体验

decisions.q: human handoff 如何避免重新变成多次确认摩擦？
decisions.answer: 所有需要 human 的地方都输出固定结构：confirmation_location、required_phrase、side_effects、why_required、resume_command、retry_policy。低风险字段默认自动补齐并记录 repairs_applied；不能安全补齐时才输出 protocol_repair_request。
decisions.note: human gate 应该是高价值中断，而不是 agent 不知道下一步时的普通停顿。

1-4.notes: 依赖 Harness output contract；确认、location、side effects、why required、resume/retry 必须结构化，普通自然语言不触发副作用。

1-5.label: GitHub 与 GitLab 的 live 能力对齐

decisions.q: GitHub/GitLab 对齐的抽象边界是什么？
decisions.answer: Route 链路协议应平台无关；GitHub/GitLab 是 provider-specific adapters。相同抽象组件尽量复用，容易误导或存在不可回避平台差异时分别实现，但必须共享同一协议、证据字段和能力映射。
decisions.note: 以 GitHub 当前实现为事实 baseline，GitLab 不应长期停留在 dry-run-supported。

decisions.q: Provider live 对齐能否只用一条全量 dogfood 证明？
decisions.answer: 不能。GitHub 与 GitLab 均按 triage、PR stewardship、repair、draft、roadmap/closeout 等 route family 分别完成 live 与 recovery evidence；全量 dogfood 仅作为最终集成证据。
decisions.note: 不同 family 的 carrier、权限、review artifact 和 closeout 语义不同，合并会掩盖未完成能力。

1-5.notes: 依赖目标矩阵与 shared completion schema。GitHub 是现有事实基线；GitLab 以共享协议做 provider-specific live adapter，不能用 dry-run parity 冒充完成。

1-6.label: 确定性脚本 gate 与 replay 证据闭环

decisions.q: 哪些部分必须固化成确定性脚本或 gate？
decisions.answer: 凡是 route matching、capability truth、preflight、request/carrier schema、dedupe/resume、confirmation envelope、release capability claim、provider parity、replay/doctor 汇总，都应优先固化为 core API/CLI/gate。LLM 只能生成 candidate，不能直接决定 route 或当前能力宣称。
decisions.note: 确定性脚本是架构目标与用户体验目标动态对齐的桥。

1-6.notes: 依赖 core ledger 与 runtime evidence schema。所有可判定规则进入 deterministic gate；结构性抽象变化才产生 architecture_review_required。

1-7.label: Dogfood 仪表盘与发布前完成判定

decisions.q: 发布前如何判定产品目标推进到位？
decisions.answer: 发布前应有 dogfood/readiness view，按 route family 展示 architecture readiness、UX readiness、provider support、last live/replay evidence、open hard stops 和 next improvement。不能只看测试通过，也不能只看用户故事顺滑。
decisions.note: 这会成为动态规划式演进的观测面：每次 A 或 B 领先，都能看到另一侧该补哪里。

1-7.notes: 依赖 1-3 至 1-6。release completion 只由受控 reference installation 证明；具体用户项目由 doctor self-assessment 判定。

1-1-1.label: Durable completion-alignment architecture and applicability map

1-1-2.label: Route Table completion target schema and generated template

decisions.q: unsupported 应属于 completion target 还是派生 ledger？
decisions.answer: unsupported 只属于派生 Completion Alignment Ledger status。Route Table completion_target.adapters 只声明 applicable 或 not-applicable-with-reason；applicable target 再用 requirement: required 表示本轮必须完成。
decisions.note: 避免把静态范围与动态能力事实混为一处；not-applicable 不阻塞，unsupported 必须阻塞完成。

1-1-2.notes: Implemented parser/type validation for metadata completion target and per-route adapter declarations; Workspace is rejected in provider_support. Generated Route Table template declares GitHub/GitLab/Workspace targets for every route. Verification: npm run build && node --test test/route.test.mjs in tools/zj-loop-core; npm test in tools/zj-loop-init.

1-1-3.label: Core Completion Alignment Ledger derivation API
1-1-3.notes: Implemented and exported pure buildCompletionAlignmentLedger API with SHA-256 target/Route Table digests, required adapter cells, not-applicable separation, unsupported/incomplete/blocked/stale priority, structured next actions, and supplied evidence overlays. Verification: npm test in tools/zj-loop-core (191 passing).

1-1-4.label: Doctor completion ledger JSON text and exit contract
1-1-4.notes: Implemented zj-loop-doctor --completion JSON/text output and --require-complete strict exit contract using the core ledger. Normal incomplete reports exit 0; strict mode exits 1 while preserving machine-readable output. Verification: npm test in tools/zj-loop-core (192 passing).

1-1-5.label: Completion contract parser and compatibility regression tests
1-1-5.notes: Completion contract regression coverage is provided by route parser tests for valid target, invalid target, Workspace/provider boundary, and ledger status precedence; init integration test verifies generated Route Tables declare all adapter targets. Verification: npm test in tools/zj-loop-core; npm test in tools/zj-loop-init.

1-2-1.label: Migrate current Route Table rows into explicit completion targets
1-2-1.notes: Migrated repository dogfood Route Table to metadata.completion_target plus explicit GitHub/GitLab/Workspace targets on all 15 routes. Regression: zj-loop-doctor --completion returns 45 declared adapter cells; every applicable cell passes architecture_integrity and every N/A cell carries a reason. Core test: npm test (193 passing).

1-2-2.label: Derive initial required-cell capability and evidence gap baseline
1-2-2.notes: Derived the initial dogfood baseline through zj-loop-doctor --completion: 15 routes, 45 adapter cells, complete=0, incomplete=2, unsupported=38, N/A=5, blocked=0, stale=0. Durable architecture document records it as a historical derived observation, not a hand-maintained source of truth.

1-2-3.label: Classify current evidence as compatible stale or missing

decisions.q: How should existing unanchored evidence links be classified before the compatibility lifecycle gate exists?
decisions.answer: Treat every applicable cell as missing compatible completion evidence; do not infer compatible or stale from bare links.
decisions.note: Existing provider_support and recent_success links remain route facts and investigation leads. Compatibility and stale derivation require the later deterministic evidence lifecycle gate.

1-2-3.notes: Documented conservative initial evidence classification: compatible=0, stale=0, and all 40 applicable cells lack compatible completion evidence because no current record carries target/Route Table/gate compatibility anchors. Bare route evidence links remain leads, not completion proof.

1-3-1.label: Automatic-progression transition trace contract
1-3-1.notes: Added derived zj-loop.automatic_progression_trace.v1 to every persisted dispatcher orchestration. It records deterministic actor/reason transitions from signal_received through route_decided and preflight to review_artifact or hard_stop, and separately represents resume/duplicate control flow. TDD regression covers review-artifact and consumer hard-stop paths (core npm test: 193 passing).

1-3-2.label: Workspace Adapter local activation and review artifact runner

1-3-3.label: Workspace Adapter local closeout resume and real Git dogfood

1-3-4.label: Bounded multi-slice continuation to artifact or hard stop
1-3-4.notes: Integrated existing deterministic bounded-slice pack into Roadmap Activation review artifacts when an explicit leaf_slices payload is present. Pack selects eligible leaves up to max_slices (default 30), carries fixed continuation/stop conditions, and requires a gate-backed result before further continuation. TDD integration covers max_slices=2 selection; full core suite passes 201 tests.

1-4-1.label: Machine-readable human handoff location and confirmation contract
1-4-1.notes: Dispatcher hard stops now emit zj-loop.human_handoff.v1 with confirmation_location, required_phrase, side_effects, why_required, canonical orchestration-id resume_command, and retry_policy. Credential remediation is explicitly not a human confirmation; disabled side-effect routes carry the fixed enable phrase and terminal-command location. Covered by dispatcher integration tests.

1-4-2.label: Low-risk protocol repairs and structured protocol repair request
1-4-2.notes: Harness normalizer fills only declared low-risk fields and does not invent authority. Every repair now carries protocol-input location, confirmation_required: false, and a deterministic resume_loop action keyed to its repair envelope; prose command hints are display-only.

1-4-3.label: Ambiguous-handoff and unnecessary-confirmation metrics gate
1-4-3.notes: Run metrics now deterministically identify confirmations lacking stopped + stop_signal + resume evidence. zj-loop.run_metrics_gate.v1 fails on those unnecessary confirmations or ambiguous next actions; tests cover a valid human gate and an invalid in-progress confirmation.

1-5-1.label: Provider adapter completion evidence mapping
1-5-1.notes: Completion ledger now maps live capability evidence by provider adapter: only provider_support.<provider>.evidence can satisfy that provider cell. A GitHub success link cannot promote GitLab.

1-5-2.label: GitHub required-route live and recovery reference evidence

1-5-3.label: GitLab signal and request-carrier live adapter parity

decisions.q: 真实 scheduled evidence 等待期间是否允许并行推进 GitLab confirmed triage transition？
decisions.answer: 允许并行推进 1-5-3-2，但 issue-backlog route 的 live maturity 不得在 1-5-3-1-5 获得 source=schedule artifact evidence 前提升。
decisions.note: 避免时间窗口造成整体停摆，同时保持 live capability claim 的证据边界。

decisions.q: Does a blocked GitLab schedule probe block all GitLab route parity?
decisions.answer: No. It blocks only schedule-probe evidence; manual and event-triggered GitLab routes continue independently.
decisions.note: Schedule variable read-back is a strict preflight for temporary owned schedules, not a platform-wide capability claim.

1-5-4.label: GitLab branch MR review and closeout live adapter parity
1-5-4.notes: All six GitLab branch/MR review and closeout parity slices are complete: Roadmap Activation, Post-Merge Closeout, CI Sweeper, Dependency Sweeper, PR Steward, and Changelog Drafter. Each route has provider-specific lifecycle evidence or bounded escalation evidence in ai-studio; Changelog Drafter additionally completed draft-evidence, draft-MR, negative merge boundary, human merge, and positive closeout.

decisions.q: GitLab required cell 的完成证据门槛是什么？
decisions.answer: 每个 applicable + required cell 必须同时具备 positive live evidence、negative/recovery evidence 与 deterministic verification；event-driven 与 scheduled 必须由对应真实触发模式证明，explicit-on-demand 才可用手动 pipeline，not-applicable 必须有语义理由。
decisions.note: report-only 以 report artifact 作为 positive；手动运行不能冒充 scheduled 或 event-driven capability。

decisions.q: human 与 ignore 是否需要专用 GitLab provider job？
decisions.answer: 纳入 GitLab required matrix，但采用协议级 GitLab evidence；真实 GitLab 来源信号进入 Route Decision，human 产出结构化 handoff/hard-stop，ignore 产出 route-decision/suppression artifact，均验证 GitLab provider binding 与零 provider side effect，不新增无意义 API job。
decisions.note: control route 不是 GitLab API 写入 route，不能用伪造 job 冒充 provider capability。

decisions.q: GitLab required-route reference installation 使用哪个项目？
decisions.answer: 只使用 mlive-dev/ai-studio 作为唯一 GitLab reference installation；复用其中兼容的既有 evidence，只在该项目补齐缺口。其他项目属于后续 installation completion，不纳入 1-5-5。
decisions.note: ai-studio 已验证 Runner、Node image、GITLAB_TOKEN、schedule、Issue/MR 与 closeout 基础设施，减少无关环境变量。

decisions.q: 1-5-5 如何拆成可执行 slices？
decisions.answer: 按触发与语义族拆为五个子节点：control/report-only、explicit-on-demand、event-driven、scheduled、全矩阵 verifier/evidence index；父节点只有五个子节点全部完成后才完成。
decisions.note: 每个子节点记录 route IDs、positive/recovery/verification evidence；子节点完成不代表 GitLab required-route 全量完成。

decisions.q: required route 如何唯一归属五个 slice？
decisions.answer: 每个 route 按真实 signal_initiation_mode 只归入一个 slice；human 与 ignore 作为唯一 control-route 例外归入 1-5-5-1；manual-smoke/roadmap 归 explicit-on-demand，Issue Triage/PR Steward/CI Sweeper/Post-Merge 归 event-driven，Daily Triage/Issue Backlog/Dependency/Changelog 归 scheduled，1-5-5-5 只做矩阵 verifier。
decisions.note: 优先触发模式，避免 report-only 与 scheduled/event-driven 双重归类造成重复或遗漏。

decisions.q: 已有 GitLab evidence 何时可以复用？
decisions.answer: 只有确定性 compatibility fingerprint 全部匹配时才复用：route/provider/project、fragment/template hash、core package 版本与 hash、signal initiation mode、adapter/verifier/artifact schema 版本及原 evidence 的 branch/config assumptions；相关变更使 evidence 标记 stale 并要求重跑，无关变更不使其失效。
decisions.note: 避免无意义重复 dogfood，同时禁止把历史成功结果直接当作当前 GitLab 全量能力。

decisions.q: 全矩阵 verifier 应新建 GitLab 专用评分器吗？
decisions.answer: 不新建；复用并扩展 zj-loop-doctor --completion、zj-loop.completion-alignment-ledger.v1、provider-parity gate 与 generated-bundle gate，补充 GitLab evidence compatibility fingerprint、矩阵索引与 stale 推导。
decisions.note: Route Table 继续拥有 capability truth，doctor/ledger 拥有用户项目 completion truth，避免第二套 GitLab completion truth。

decisions.q: GitLab matrix cell 如何表达未完成状态？
decisions.answer: 严格区分 complete、incomplete、blocked、stale、unsupported；不统一记为 incomplete，不做分数平均。每个非 complete cell 必须携带 owner、structured reason、evidence 状态、resume/next command，以及是否需要 Human 配置或授权。
decisions.note: 代码缺口、外部环境阻塞、fingerprint 失效和语义不适用是不同事实，不能让其他 Agent 误判为同一种待重试状态。

decisions.q: report-only 与 control route 是否需要 recovery evidence？
decisions.answer: 必须需要；human/ignore/report route 分别验证结构化 human_handoff、suppression/route-decision 或 protocol_repair_request 等 stop/recovery artifact，并证明零 GitLab API 写入。
decisions.note: 无副作用不等于无需验证停止行为；GitLab 来源下的协议边界同样必须可回放。

decisions.q: event-driven GitLab dogfood 使用什么 fixture？
decisions.answer: 所有 event-driven route 使用专用、可回滚、固定 binding 的 GitLab fixture：测试 Issue/label-state、测试 MR/IID/head SHA、generated-substrate CI failure、已合并 closeout MR/contract；每个 fixture 有 dedupe key、scope verifier 与 closeout，不触碰 ai-studio 业务逻辑。
decisions.note: 一次 fixture 成功只证明对应 route，不跨 route 泛化 evidence。

decisions.q: scheduled GitLab route 如何产生真实 evidence？
decisions.answer: 每个 scheduled required route 使用 route-specific owned schedule、精确单分钟 cron、固定 target branch/project/job/artifact schema；schedule probe 验证 source=schedule、schedule ID、pipeline/job artifact 与时间窗口。schedule 生命周期必须有创建、更新、恢复、删除 evidence；schedule 961 仅保留为既有 schedule-probe evidence，不泛化为所有 route。
decisions.note: 禁止 */1；每个 schedule 只制造一次目标 evidence，避免重复 artifact 与噪声。

decisions.q: scheduled route 是否默认允许 provider side effect？
decisions.answer: 否。scheduled pipeline 默认只运行 report/plan/preflight；Issue/MR/branch/label/commit 写入必须进入独立 recovery job，并要求显式 confirmation 或已验证的 route-specific trusted-automation capability。schedule 不隐式获得 GITLAB_TOKEN 写权限。
decisions.note: trusted automation 若启用，必须单独记录 side-effect scope、变量来源、claim、verifier 与 recovery evidence。

decisions.q: trusted automation 如何授权？
decisions.answer: 必须采用 route-specific、side-effect-scope-specific promotion；禁止全局 trusted automation 开关。每个 route 的 capability proof、promotion、项目变量和 runtime side-effect scope 独立校验，evidence stale 时自动降级 report-only/hard stop。
decisions.note: 避免一次项目变量授权意外打开所有 scheduled route。

decisions.q: trusted automation promotion 使用什么确认短语？
decisions.answer: 使用独立固定短语 PROMOTE_GITLAB_TRUSTED_AUTOMATION_<route-id>；该短语只授权 capability promotion，不替代 runtime 项目变量，也不能扩大 route 或 side-effect scope。runtime variable 与 promotion evidence 必须同时有效，evidence stale 时即使变量仍存在也只能 hard stop。
decisions.note: promotion phrase、runtime enablement、side-effect scope 三者分离，避免项目变量自带升级权限。

decisions.q: reference validation completeness 与 runtime automation 是否共用一个阻塞状态？
decisions.answer: 不共用，采用双轴模型：1-5-5 的全矩阵证据用于 reference validation、发布能力声明与 doctor completion；低风险 report/artifact/plan/verification route 在安装后默认自动运行，不因矩阵其他 cell blocked/stale 而停摆。trusted automation promotion 只约束不可逆或业务影响的 provider side effect。
decisions.note: 避免全量验证工程把自动产品体验退化成逐 route 人工授权；reference gap 与 runtime stop 必须分离。

decisions.q: runtime automation 默认策略使用什么风险模型？
decisions.answer: 复用 Route Table 既有 execution.mode、side_effect_level、guards.human_gate、completion_forms 与 route-specific trusted-automation guard；evidence/report/plan 默认自动，allowlisted request/claim 经 binding/dedupe/verifier 后默认自动，bounded branch/repair-MR/draft 遵循各 route 协议，merge/close/release/publish/业务 tracker mutation 保留 Human 或 route-specific trusted promotion。
decisions.note: 不新增全局 risk score，也不把所有 provider write 一刀切为 Human gate，避免不同 consumer 语义互相拖累。

decisions.q: trusted automation 未满足时如何输出用户 handoff？
decisions.answer: 必须输出固定结构化 envelope：status=blocked、reason=trusted_automation_not_promoted 或 evidence_stale、side_effects_executed=false、route/provider/project/promotion scope、固定 confirmation phrase、structured next_steps command array；zj-loop-doctor JSON 为主 truth，人类摘要仅展示层。
decisions.note: 禁止普通自然语言求助；Codex Harness 可按 envelope resume，Human 只在真实 promotion boundary 授权一次。

decisions.q: trusted automation promotion 使用什么 CLI 入口？
decisions.answer: 复用 zj-loop-route promotion-gate，新增 target=trusted-automation；命令显式接收 provider、project、scope，check-only 默认，--apply 仍需固定 phrase；不新建独立 trusted automation CLI。
decisions.note: 统一 promotion truth 与现有 execution-ready promotion，避免两套授权生命周期。

decisions.q: trusted automation promotion state 属于哪里？
decisions.answer: 采用项目级 installation evidence overlay：Route Table 只声明允许的 trusted_automation scopes、gate 与 side-effect 上限；ai-studio 保存绑定 provider/project/route/scope/fingerprint 的 promotion evidence；zj-loop-doctor 将 policy 与项目 evidence 合并派生 runtime 状态，stale/mismatch 自动降级。不把单项目 promotion 写成全局 Route Table capability。
decisions.note: trusted automation 是安装环境授权，不是 package 默认能力；保持 provider/project 隔离。

decisions.q: trusted automation promotion evidence 如何保存？
decisions.answer: 统一保存为项目级低成本 JSON artifact：zj-loop/evidence/trusted-automation/<provider>/<route-id>.json，schema=zj-loop.trusted_automation_promotion.v1。只保存 provider/project/route/scope、policy与compatibility fingerprint、authority、promotion/revoke时间、scope与evidence refs；不保存 token、完整 GitLab response 或敏感 payload；doctor 扫描 raw artifact 并派生 runtime ledger。
decisions.note: 项目级 overlay 是 raw evidence，doctor ledger 是派生 truth，避免全局能力污染和第二套状态机。

decisions.q: trusted automation 如何撤销或失效？
decisions.answer: 采用自动失效加显式撤销双通道：相关 fingerprint/policy/fragment/core/schema/project/branch/权限变化自动 status=stale 并停止副作用；maintainer 可通过 promotion-gate --target trusted-automation --revoke 与独立短语 REVOKE_GITLAB_TRUSTED_AUTOMATION_<route-id> 撤销；历史 evidence 保留，重新启用必须重新 promotion。
decisions.note: 删除或恢复项目变量不能伪造 promotion，也不能抹去历史审计。

decisions.q: trusted promotion stale 或 revoked 后如何运行？
decisions.answer: 按 route 既有 side-effect policy 分层降级：evidence/report/plan 可继续并记录 promotion_stale；request/claim 仅在 route 已声明允许无 promotion 的 bounded automation 时继续，否则 structured hard stop；branch/commit/MR/Issue mutation 立即 hard stop 且 side_effects_executed=false；merge/close/release/publish 始终保留 Human boundary。
decisions.note: 不因高风险 promotion 状态把所有低风险自动路径全局停掉，也不让 stale promotion 继续产生 provider mutation。

decisions.q: GitLab trusted runtime variable 如何绑定运行环境？
decisions.answer: 必须全部满足：变量只存在 ai-studio 项目配置；route-specific；值仅允许 enabled；job 校验 CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE=schedule 与 target branch allowlist；promotion evidence 的 project/route/scope/fingerprint 必须匹配；GITLAB_TOKEN 独立存在；Web/manual pipeline 即使读取变量也不得触发 trusted side effect。
decisions.note: 变量表示运行时选择，不获得 promotion 或扩大 side-effect scope。

decisions.q: trusted runtime variable 谁可以配置或撤销？
decisions.answer: 只能由 Human maintainer 在 GitLab 项目设置中配置、修改或删除；Agent 不调用 Project Variables API，不自动恢复变量。Agent 只读取存在性与固定枚举状态，输出 variable_present/config binding 摘要；schedule preflight 发现缺失或撤销后自动降级。
decisions.note: 把项目授权保留在明确的人类配置边界，避免 Agent 通过变量 API 自我升级权限。

decisions.q: 事故经验 TODO 应放在哪个路线图位置？
decisions.answer: A：在 1-5-5 下新增 GitLab 自动化副作用安全回归父节点及子 TODO
decisions.note: 这些问题来自真实 required-route dogfood，应成为 GitLab 验证门禁，不回写为既有 CI Sweeper 功能已完成。

1-5-3-1.label: GitLab issue-backlog scheduled signal and report evidence

decisions.q: 当 GitLab scheduler 无法生成 source=schedule pipeline 时，是否允许用 API/manual pipeline 充当 scheduled evidence？
decisions.answer: 不允许；必须输出可回放的 schedule-health escalation
decisions.note: API/manual 可用于运行时诊断，但不能替代 scheduled evidence。

decisions.q: GitLab schedule-health 的完成判定是否同时要求配置存在与真实 scheduled pipeline/artifact？
decisions.answer: 两层都要
decisions.note: 配置层检查 active/cron/ref；执行层检查预期窗口内 source=schedule pipeline 和 route artifact，并分别给出 escalation reason。

decisions.q: schedule-health 应使用独立命令，还是归入现有 zj-loop-doctor？
decisions.answer: 归入 zj-loop-doctor
decisions.note: Doctor 提供 provider-aware 统一诊断与 escalation；adapter 仅查询平台事实。

decisions.q: zj-loop-doctor 是否默认访问 provider API 检查 schedule-health？
decisions.answer: 仅在显式 --provider gitlab 或 --schedule-health 时访问网络
decisions.note: 普通 doctor 保持本地；provider 检查分别报告认证、连通性、配置与执行证据。

decisions.q: schedule-health 的执行窗口如何判定？
decisions.answer: 从 cron 推导周期，允许 --expected-within-minutes 覆盖，并加固定 10 分钟 grace
decisions.note: Doctor 输出计算后的 expected_window，支持非标准 cron 与时区差异下的可回放诊断。

decisions.q: zj-loop-doctor --schedule-health 是否允许自动启用 schedule、修改 cron 或调用 play？
decisions.answer: 不允许
decisions.note: Doctor 只读输出 schedule-health escalation；任何外部副作用由独立 setup/operate 路径承担。

decisions.q: schedule-health escalation 的主 truth 与用户输出是什么？
decisions.answer: Doctor 结构化 JSON 为主 truth，同时提供简短摘要和 next_steps 命令数组
decisions.note: 不自动写 issue/comment/state，避免诊断制造 tracker 噪声。

decisions.q: 成功 scheduled pipeline 是否自动提升 GitLab issue-backlog-triage Route Table maturity？
decisions.answer: 不自动提升
decisions.note: 只形成 promotion candidate/live evidence；Route Table 仍经明确 promotion gate 升级。

decisions.q: schedule-health 第一阶段应只硬编码 issue-backlog-triage，还是采用通用协议？
decisions.answer: 通用协议，先实现 GitLab adapter，命令显式 --route <route-id>
decisions.note: 避免复制逻辑；不默认猜 route，GitLab 先解决当前缺口。

decisions.q: 同一 route 存在多个 GitLab schedules 时，doctor 如何定位目标？
decisions.answer: schedule_id 参数必填
decisions.note: route 参数与 schedule_id 参数均显式提供，不按 description、cron 或 ref 模糊匹配。

decisions.q: Doctor 的 GitLab API 凭据应如何提供？
decisions.answer: 仅解析现有环境变量 GITLAB_TOKEN、GITLAB_PRIVATE_TOKEN、GLAB_TOKEN，不新增 token CLI 参数
decisions.note: 按该优先级解析；仅报告 auth_source 名称，禁止输出 token 或完整 provider response。

decisions.q: Doctor 的自托管 GitLab API 地址如何确定？
decisions.answer: api-url 参数可选；默认 CI_API_V4_URL，否则回退 GitLab.com API
decisions.note: 结构化 JSON 记录最终 api_url；支持 CI 与本地 self-hosted 场景。

decisions.q: GitLab project path 是否允许从 CI 或 git remote 推导？
decisions.answer: project 参数必填
decisions.note: 与 route、schedule_id 一样显式指定，避免 worktree、fork 或 remote 导致错误关联。

decisions.q: Doctor 如何确认 scheduled pipeline 完成了指定 route？
decisions.answer: artifact path 参数必填
decisions.note: 查询最新 source=schedule pipeline 的对应 job，并验证显式指定 artifact 存在；不硬编码 route-artifact 映射。

decisions.q: 仅验证 scheduled artifact 存在是否足够？
decisions.answer: 不够；artifact schema 参数必填并下载验证 JSON schema 字段
decisions.note: 当前 issue backlog 使用 zj-loop.issue_recommendations.v1；避免空文件或错误产物误判为成功。

decisions.q: Doctor 从 scheduled pipeline 的哪个 job 下载 artifact？
decisions.answer: job name 参数必填
decisions.note: 避免同一 pipeline 多个 consumer 上传同名 artifact 时误关联；目标对象全部显式。

decisions.q: schedule 下一次预期运行尚未来到时，doctor 应如何报告？
decisions.answer: not_due，不作为 warning 或 escalation
decisions.note: 输出 next_run_at、expected_window 与当前时间；超出窗口仍无 scheduled pipeline 才 execution_missing。

decisions.q: schedule 被编辑后，旧 scheduled pipeline 能否继续作为健康证据？
decisions.answer: 不能
decisions.note: 匹配 pipeline 创建时间必须不早于 schedule.updated_at；配置变更后必须有新的真实 scheduled evidence。

1-5-3-2.label: GitLab confirmed triage transition source-issue carrier evidence

decisions.q: What is the first GitLab confirmation entrypoint?
decisions.answer: A maintainer manually starts a GitLab Web pipeline with a structured transition request and fixed confirmation phrase.
decisions.note: The CI job writes the request-only Issue Fix Request comment to the source issue through the GitLab Issue Notes API. A later webhook can reuse this protocol without changing its side-effect contract.

decisions.q: Which credential may write a GitLab source issue request comment?
decisions.answer: Only GITLAB_TOKEN.
decisions.note: No fallback to CI_JOB_TOKEN, GITLAB_PRIVATE_TOKEN, or GLAB_TOKEN. Missing GITLAB_TOKEN is a structured hard stop before any Issue Notes API request.

decisions.q: How does the manual GitLab pipeline receive a confirmed transition?
decisions.answer: It accepts only ZJ_LOOP_TRIAGE_REQUEST_JSON and ZJ_LOOP_TRIAGE_CONFIRMATION.
decisions.note: The request must validate as zj-loop.recommended_triage_transition.v1 and confirmation must exactly equal CONFIRM_TRIAGE_TRANSITION. Missing or invalid values produce a structured refusal artifact before any Issue Notes API call.

decisions.q: How does GitLab transition execution remain idempotent?
decisions.answer: Read and parse source issue notes before writing; return duplicate for an existing active request instead of posting another note.
decisions.note: The dedupe check uses Issue Fix Request markers and active dedupe_key/request state. A new note is posted only when no active source-issue carrier exists.

decisions.q: How is the GitLab source issue bound to a transition request?
decisions.answer: It must bind exactly to the current CI project and a positive GitLab issue IID.
decisions.note: tracker must be gitlab; source repo/project_path must equal CI_PROJECT_PATH; and any source URL must parse to that same GitLab project and issue. Any mismatch returns request-source-mismatch before any Issue Notes API call.

decisions.q: How does GitLab transition execution recover from an uncertain Issue Notes write?
decisions.answer: Never retry the write blindly; re-read notes once to detect the exact request marker.
decisions.note: A matching marker returns recovered-duplicate with note evidence. No match after timeout/network/5xx returns note-write-unknown hard stop. Explicit 4xx failures hard-stop directly without a second read.

decisions.q: Does a successful GitLab transition job directly start Roadmap-Sliced Development?
decisions.answer: No. It stops after creating or deduplicating the source-issue Issue Fix Request carrier.
decisions.note: It emits structured handoff evidence only. Roadmap-Sliced Development must independently consume the carrier through Route Dispatcher and owns branch/MR plus implementation lifecycle.

decisions.q: What is required to claim GitLab live support for this route?
decisions.answer: A real GitLab Web pipeline artifact must prove validated binding, dedupe outcome, verified source note marker, and Route Dispatcher handoff.
decisions.note: Persist only low-cost audit fields: request id, source issue URL/IID, current project binding, note ID/URL, marker validation, dedupe outcome, and handoff reference. Unit/replay tests alone remain replayed evidence.

decisions.q: Should GitLab trusted-automation confirmation be implemented in this slice?
decisions.answer: Yes. Implement it as a real bounded runner in the same slice, not only as a Route Table declaration.
decisions.note: It must remain separately guarded and evidenced from the human Web-pipeline path; no unsupported provider context may claim trusted automation.

decisions.q: What GitLab runtime fact authorizes trusted transition automation?
decisions.answer: Only a scheduled pipeline with CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE=schedule and ZJ_LOOP_TRUSTED_TRIAGE_AUTOMATION=enabled.
decisions.note: The trusted path may consume only same-job generated and validated ready-for-agent recommendations. It never accepts externally supplied transition JSON. A provider unable to execute scheduled pipelines hard-stops this automatic path while preserving the human Web-pipeline path.

decisions.q: How many carrier notes may trusted scheduled automation create per scan?
decisions.answer: At most one, selected by a deterministic order from eligible ready-for-agent recommendations.
decisions.note: Remaining candidates stay recommendation evidence for later runs. This preserves progress while honoring batch_mutation_allowed=false and bounding write cost plus replay scope.

decisions.q: Which scheduled candidates may trusted automation confirm?
decisions.answer: Only deterministic high-confidence ready-for-agent candidates with no assignment, risk flag, or blocker.
decisions.note: The candidate must be agent-ready-request, carry ready-for-agent, map to an allowlisted bug or enhancement category, and be converted by deterministic rules into a high-confidence transition request. All other recommendations remain report-only.

decisions.q: How are GitLab tracker labels interpreted for trusted triage automation?
decisions.answer: Resolve them only through an explicit Route Table mapping to zj-triage canonical roles; ignore all unrelated labels.
decisions.note: Auto confirmation requires exactly one mapped category role and exactly one mapped ready-for-agent state role. Missing or conflicting role mappings remain report-only rather than inviting invented label semantics.

decisions.q: Where and how are canonical triage role mappings defined?
decisions.answer: Define the complete provider-scoped mapping in Route Table policy, and enforce parsing, disjointness, and precise edits through deterministic scripts.
decisions.note: All seven zj-triage roles are declared once per provider. Extra tracker labels are ignored. Auto transition reads only bug|enhancement plus ready-for-agent. No agent infers mappings; changes must be explicit and script-validated.

decisions.q: Must adapting a new tracker label require a core package release?
decisions.answer: No. It is an explicit project Route Table mapping change made only through a deterministic CLI and validation gate.
decisions.note: The CLI prevents agent inference and hand-edited ambiguity while keeping per-project label adaptation practical. Core code changes only when mapping semantics or the canonical role model itself changes.

decisions.q: How may a deterministic triage-role mapping CLI change Route Table policy?
decisions.answer: It defaults to read-only validation and plan output; only apply with UPDATE_TRIAGE_ROLE_MAPPING may write.
decisions.note: validate is CI-safe. plan shows the exact disjointness-checked diff. apply is the sole mutation path and records the fixed confirmation boundary for a change that affects future automation eligibility.

decisions.q: Should starters ship a default triage-role mapping?
decisions.answer: Yes. Generate standard same-name canonical mappings for GitHub and GitLab, but keep trusted automation disabled by default.
decisions.note: Projects using other labels must update the mapping through the deterministic validate/plan/apply CLI. Installation alone never writes issue notes or enables trusted automation.

decisions.q: Can the current GitLab instance claim scheduled trusted-automation live support?
decisions.answer: No. Keep scheduled trusted automation blocked-with-follow-up until another GitLab instance proves real scheduled pipeline evidence.
decisions.note: The implementation, protocol, deterministic tests, and human Web-pipeline path may complete independently. Missing scheduled evidence must remain visible and cannot be compensated by human-path success.

decisions.q: Do human Web and trusted scheduled GitLab paths share the transition executor?
decisions.answer: Yes. Share deterministic role mapping, request validation, source binding, authority checks, dedupe, note-write recovery, and low-cost evidence.
decisions.note: The GitLab-specific adapter owns only Issue Notes API calls and CI context parsing. Web and scheduled inputs must not grow separate side-effect semantics.

decisions.q: What does the current GitLab schedule 961 dogfood prove?
decisions.answer: The current GitLab instance has real scheduled trusted-automation evidence for issue-backlog-triage and issue-triage-transition.
decisions.note: Pipeline 10503630 source=schedule; zj_loop_issue_triage success; transition-result completed duplicate for Issue #160 with note 19639888 and roadmap-sliced-development handoff.

decisions.q: Does the merged master branch preserve the GitLab scheduled triage route?
decisions.answer: Yes. Schedule 961 now targets master and pipeline 10503861 completed the scheduled issue-backlog-triage and issue-triage-transition path.
decisions.note: source=schedule; ref=master; daily triage, issue triage, and schedule-probe receipt succeeded; Issue #160 returned completed duplicate with note 19639888 and roadmap-sliced-development handoff.

1-5-4-1.label: GitLab Roadmap activation branch and draft-MR contract

decisions.q: Which credential may GitLab Roadmap Activation use for live branch/MR side effects?
decisions.answer: Only GITLAB_TOKEN.
decisions.note: The generated GitLab workflow must not authorize live activation with CI_JOB_TOKEN; the core CLI and adapter use PRIVATE-TOKEN from GITLAB_TOKEN only.

decisions.q: What is the GitLab activation target branch source?
decisions.answer: Use CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH from the target project.
decisions.note: This keeps self-managed GitLab projects such as ai-studio on master without a provider-specific hardcoded main fallback.

decisions.q: When may the GitLab activation workflow create a branch or draft MR?
decisions.answer: Only an explicitly enabled Route Table route may reach the manual live job; the job then requires GITLAB_TOKEN and emits branch/MR evidence.
decisions.note: Route enablement remains separate from the generated user's default disabled route profile.

1-5-4-2.label: GitLab post-merge roadmap closeout execution evidence

decisions.q: GitLab closeout dogfood 是否创建最小受控 MR 并绑定专用 carrier issue？
decisions.answer: 是，创建最小受控 MR；由 human 合并后执行 live closeout。
decisions.note: MR 只承担 closeout 验证，不扩展产品功能；硬门槛是合法 post-merge contract、MR merged、删除唯一 zjal- 分支、追加 closeout evidence、关闭 carrier issue。

decisions.q: GitLab closeout dogfood 是否使用独立 carrier issue，而不是复用 Issue #160？
decisions.answer: 是，创建新的专用 carrier issue。
decisions.note: 避免混淆 triage source issue、activation carrier 与 closeout carrier 生命周期；closeout 只能关闭 contract 指定的独立 carrier。

decisions.q: GitLab closeout dogfood 的最小 MR 变更放在哪里？
decisions.answer: 新增 docs/plans/gitlab-roadmap-closeout-dogfood.md。
decisions.note: 只记录目的、contract 约束和待回填 evidence；不修改业务代码或 CI 逻辑。

1-5-4-3.label: GitLab CI Sweeper repair-MR live recovery evidence

decisions.q: GitLab CI Sweeper live recovery dogfood 使用哪个目标项目？
decisions.answer: 继续使用 mlive-dev/ai-studio
decisions.note: 复用已验证的 GitLab token、Route Table、MR、live closeout 和 evidence 基础设施；受控 failure 必须最小且可回滚。

decisions.q: GitLab CI Sweeper 的 Issue Fix Request carrier 采用什么载体？
decisions.answer: 创建独立 GitLab Issue Fix Request
decisions.note: 与 GitHub CI Sweeper 的独立 Issue carrier 对齐；不把 source pipeline、triage source issue 与 repair MR 生命周期混在一起。后续由 allowlisted CI Sweeper consumer claim 并创建 provider-aware repair MR。

decisions.q: GitLab Issue Fix Request 创建后，如何触发独立 CI Sweeper Consumer？
decisions.answer: 由独立 consumer workflow 消费 carrier；report job 不直接创建 repair MR
decisions.note: Issue Fix Request 创建与 repair MR 创建保持副作用边界分离；consumer 必须经过 request-level verifier、route-level allowlist 和 capability match。

decisions.q: GitLab CI Sweeper Consumer 的触发与恢复方式是什么？
decisions.answer: 即时 dispatcher pipeline 为主，scheduled scan 作为漏触发 request 的恢复/补偿入口
decisions.note: Issue 创建后由受控 API 触发独立 consumer pipeline 并传入 request issue IID；定时扫描只消费仍处于 requested/active 且未 claim 的 request，必须使用 dedupe 与 claim guard。

decisions.q: GitLab CI Sweeper 即时 trigger、consumer claim 与 repair MR 使用什么权限来源？
decisions.answer: 只接受项目显式受控变量 GITLAB_TOKEN
decisions.note: 不回退 CI_JOB_TOKEN、GL_TOKEN 或 CLI token 参数；token 缺失、权限不足、变量不可回读时结构化 hard stop，零次 repair MR API 写入。即时与 scheduled recovery 共用同一权限边界。

decisions.q: CI Sweeper Consumer claim 的最低 verifier 条件是什么？
decisions.answer: 只消费通过 structured Issue Fix Request、项目绑定、route allowlist、request verifier 与 capability match 的请求
decisions.note: 要求合法 zj-loop:issue-fix-request envelope、status=requested、requested_consumer=ci-sweeper、route request_kind=issue-fix-request、GitLab provider、source project 与当前项目一致、allowlisted verification gate、未进入 claim/failed/completed lifecycle；label 仅作可选索引，不能授权 claim。

decisions.q: 用户项目如何对齐 scripts/ci-validate-gates.sh？
decisions.answer: 语义对齐、脚本不复制
decisions.note: scripts/ci-validate-gates.sh 继续作为 ZAgenticLoop 仓库 reference verifier；发布包提供确定性 zj-loop-ci-sweeper verifier API/CLI；用户项目通过显式 project gate allowlist 接入，不复制复杂仓库专用脚本，Agent 不运行时猜测 gate。

decisions.q: project gate allowlist 放在哪里？
decisions.answer: 只放用户项目的 zj-loop/zj-loop-route-table.yaml
decisions.note: 作为 ci-sweeper route 的 guards/verifier 配置落点；不进入 patterns/registry.yaml，不复制 scripts/ci-validate-gates.sh，也不让 Agent 运行时猜测项目 gate。

decisions.q: project gate allowlist 采用什么命令表示？
decisions.answer: 使用结构化 command/args/cwd 数组
decisions.note: 禁止 shell command 字符串、管道、重定向和命令替换；每个 gate 有稳定 id；repair MR 只能执行 request 与 Route Table allowlist 的交集，并输出 exit code、duration 与 artifact path。

decisions.q: GitLab CI Sweeper 何时允许创建 repair MR？
decisions.answer: 仅在确定性 repair 后存在 scope 内实际 diff 且全部 required verifier gates 通过时创建
decisions.note: claim 后在临时 branch 执行 request 与 Route Table allowlist 的 gate；空 diff、scope 越界、protected/denylisted 路径、任一 required gate 失败均不创建 MR，追加 structured failed evidence；retry 必须创建新 request。

decisions.q: CI Sweeper claim 如何防止并发重复消费？
decisions.answer: 追加结构化 claim comment，再 re-read 选出唯一 winner
decisions.note: claim comment 只追加不编辑，包含 request_id、consumer_id、claim_id、claimed_at、source_pipeline_id；re-read 后只有唯一有效 winner 可继续。其他 consumer 返回 duplicate；不确定写入只做一次 marker re-read，不重发。

decisions.q: GitLab CI Sweeper repair MR 的 branch/commit/MR 如何创建？
decisions.answer: 采用 GitLab provider-specific API adapter，由 GITLAB_TOKEN 创建 branch、commit 与 MR
decisions.note: branch 使用 automated/ci-sweeper-gitlab-<pipeline-id>-<request-hash>；commit/MR body 携带 Issue Fix Request、claim、repair 与 verifier evidence；不依赖 runner 配置 git remote 或 shell push，human merge 保持独立。

decisions.q: GitLab Commit API adapter 是否只支持窄 action 子集？
decisions.answer: 协议层支持完整 action set，route/request 双层 allowlist 限制实际动作
decisions.note: adapter 支持 create/update/delete/move/chmod，并可在显式 capability 下处理 base64 binary；symlink、submodule、默认 LFS 不支持。所有路径、大小、diff、删除、移动和权限变更都做确定性校验与低成本审计。

decisions.q: CI Sweeper 默认允许哪些 GitLab Commit API actions？
decisions.answer: create/update/delete/move/chmod；默认仅 UTF-8 文本
decisions.note: binary 需 request 显式 capability；symlink、submodule、默认 LFS 拒绝；chmod 仅 100644/100755；delete/move/chmod 显式声明；action、路径、scope、大小和 diff 均经 route/request verifier。

1-5-4-3.notes: 开始在 mlive-dev/ai-studio 验证 GitLab CI Sweeper repair-MR live recovery；先建立最小可回滚 CI failure，再验证 Issue Fix Request、Route Dispatcher、claim、repair MR、human merge 与 post-merge closeout。

1-5-4-4.label: GitLab Dependency Sweeper repair-MR live recovery evidence

decisions.q: GitLab Dependency Sweeper 是否沿用 CI Sweeper 的 Issue Fix Request、claim/verifier、repair-MR 与 closeout 主链路？
decisions.answer: 是；复用共享协议和已验证基础设施，保留 Dependency Sweeper 自己的 provider adapter、repair scope、verification gates 与 closeout contract
decisions.note: 目标是验证第二类 repair consumer，不能因复用 CI Sweeper 基础设施而把两个 route 的 capability、scope 或 evidence 语义混为一谈。

decisions.q: GitLab Dependency Sweeper dogfood 是否修改 ai-studio 业务依赖？
decisions.answer: 否；使用 zj-loop/dogfood 下的专用 npm fixture，并由 GitLab provider-specific Commit/MR API 创建 repair MR
decisions.note: fixture 只验证 dependency repair-MR 协议、scope、verification 和 closeout，不改变目标项目业务 package.json；不能把 gh CLI 逻辑泛化为 GitLab adapter。

decisions.q: GitLab Dependency Sweeper dogfood 的 fixture 变更如何固定？
decisions.answer: 固定 zj-loop/dogfood/dependency-fixture 中 yaml 2.8.0 -> 2.8.1 的 patch 升级，更新 package.json 与 package-lock.json，并运行 fixture 内 npm ci 与测试 gate
decisions.note: 复用既有 yaml patch 升级先例；双文件 scope 可验证 manifest/lockfile 一致性，避免修改 ai-studio 业务依赖。

decisions.q: GitLab Dependency Sweeper 是否复用 CI Sweeper 的 route-specific repair command？
decisions.answer: 否；新增独立 dependency-sweeper GitLab repair-MR adapter/CLI，复用协议与 provider API 原语，但独立校验 dependency scope、版本升级和 verification evidence
decisions.note: CI Sweeper 与 Dependency Sweeper 的 repair action 语义不同；共享抽象不能掩盖 route-specific capability。

decisions.q: Issue Fix Request carrier/claim/lifecycle 是否提炼为共享 GitLab lifecycle 原语？
decisions.answer: 是；共享 envelope/source binding、dedupe、claim winner re-read、lifecycle evidence 与 audit 字段，CI/Dependency 保留各自 verifier、capability 和 repair scope
decisions.note: 共享的是确定性协议组件，不是泛 Git provider；route-specific 语义继续由各 consumer adapter 控制。

decisions.q: GitLab Dependency Sweeper adapter 是否由 verifier 生成固定 Commit API actions，adapter 只负责 provider API？
decisions.answer: 是；verifier 生成固定 package.json/package-lock.json actions，GitLab provider-specific adapter 只负责 branch、Commit API 与 MR API，不执行 shell/npm/git，也不复用 CI Sweeper repair command
decisions.note: Dependency 语义、scope、版本与 verification 由独立 verifier 控制；adapter 只转换并提交已验证 actions，human merge 保持独立。

decisions.q: GitLab Dependency Sweeper fragment 是否加入独立 gitlab-repair-mr 手动作业？
decisions.answer: 是；仅消费显式 verifier-generated actions 与固定 request/source/branch/target 参数，默认 manual，不自动 claim、不自动启用 Route Table live side effects
decisions.note: fragment 负责确定性入口和 artifact wiring；Dependency verifier 负责语义与 scope；adapter 负责 GitLab API。

decisions.q: GitLab Dependency Sweeper live dogfood 使用哪个目标项目与变更边界？
decisions.answer: 继续使用 mlive-dev/ai-studio；只在 zj-loop/dogfood/dependency-fixture 验证 yaml 2.8.0 -> 2.8.1，不修改 ai-studio 业务 package.json、package-lock.json 或业务源码
decisions.note: 真实证据必须包含 GitLab Commit API、Dependency repair MR、human merge 前后的 lifecycle；fixture substrate 与业务依赖隔离。

decisions.q: Dependency Sweeper 实装到用户项目时，merged repair-MR closeout 是否要求固定确认短语？
decisions.answer: 是；当前协议与用户项目统一要求 DELETE_MERGED_DEPENDENCY_SWEEPER_BRANCH_AND_CLOSE_CARRIER。安装包只提供确定性 closeout CLI；未来只有 Route Table 显式声明 auto-closeout capability 且全部前置条件满足时，才可免人工确认
decisions.note: destructive side effects 不能因用户项目安装包而隐式放宽；confirmation location、required phrase 与 side effects 必须结构化输出。

1-5-4-5.label: GitLab PR Steward MR report and fix-request evidence

decisions.q: GitLab PR Steward live evidence 是否作为 Dependency Sweeper 之后的下一条 provider parity 路线？
decisions.answer: 是；直接进入 GitLab PR Steward live evidence，复用已验证的 GitLab MR、Issue Fix Request、claim、scope verifier 与 closeout 基础设施，但保留 PR Steward 自己的 review/checks 语义和 provider-specific adapter。
decisions.note: 先完成 report/request 与 MR source binding 的最小真实链路，再推进 fix-request/claim/live repair；不把 Dependency Sweeper 的 dependency scope 逻辑泛化到 PR Steward。

decisions.q: PR Steward GitLab dogfood 使用什么 fixture？
decisions.answer: 使用 ai-studio 中只影响 zj-loop/dogfood 的受控 CI failure MR；先完成 MR report-only live evidence，再推进 failed-check 到 Issue Fix Request，不触碰业务代码。
decisions.note: fixture 必须可回滚、可重复，report-only 不评论/改 label/创建 request；request-only 只消费 allowlisted failed-check evidence，并固定校验 project、MR IID、head SHA 与 route consumer binding。

decisions.q: PR Steward GitLab report/request 完成后是否继续追踪 claim 与 repair 边界？
decisions.answer: 是；增加独立 claim/lifecycle 与 bounded repair/escalation 子节点，避免 report/request evidence 被误认为完整 consumer 链路。
decisions.note: 1-5-4-5 只有在 report、request、claim、verifier、repair/escalation evidence 全部完成后才可视为完整 GitLab PR Steward parity。

1-5-4-5.notes: GitLab PR Steward report, request, claim/verifier, and bounded escalation evidence are complete in ai-studio. Repair MR creation remains explicitly false for this evidence because no deterministic repair plan was supplied; this is the accepted escalation completion form and does not claim repair-MR support.

1-5-4-6.label: GitLab Changelog Drafter draft artifact or draft-MR evidence

decisions.q: GitLab Changelog Drafter 的默认完成形态是什么？
decisions.answer: 默认 draft-evidence，只有显式确认才创建 draft-MR。
decisions.note: 复用现有 promotion-gate 与 draft-consumer completion contract；GitLab provider-specific adapter 只在确认后执行 branch/commit/MR API。

decisions.q: draft-evidence 的副作用边界是什么？
decisions.answer: 默认只生成并上传 CI artifact，不写入 tracked repository files；只有显式确认 draft-MR 才允许 GitLab branch/commit/MR API 写入。
decisions.note: draft-plan.json 与 changelog-draft.md 是 review artifact；draft-MR 是独立的 provider-side effect path。

decisions.q: GitLab Changelog Drafter 如何获得 release window？
decisions.answer: 只消费显式且完整的 ZJ_LOOP_CHANGELOG_DRAFT_REQUEST_JSON；不自动猜测 since_ref、until_ref 或 release window。缺失或 repo/base_branch 不匹配时输出 protocol_repair_request 或 escalation，零次 draft-MR API 写入。
decisions.note: 结构化输入是协议边界；provider adapter 不替 Agent 推断发布范围。

decisions.q: GitLab draft-evidence 是否要求 GITLAB_TOKEN？
decisions.answer: 不要求。draft-evidence 只生成 CI artifact；只有显式 draft-MR 才要求 GITLAB_TOKEN 并调用 GitLab branch/commit/MR API。
decisions.note: token 绑定 provider-side write，不把无副作用的 artifact 生成误判为 live 授权。

decisions.q: GitLab draft-MR 如何授权？
decisions.answer: 复用 CREATE_CHANGELOG_DRAFT_PR_OR_EVIDENCE，但只有显式 draft_mode=pr 且确认短语匹配时才允许创建 MR；确认短语本身不能升级默认 draft-evidence。
decisions.note: 复用 promotion-gate 兼容协议，同时把 output mode 作为独立副作用边界。

decisions.q: GitLab draft-MR 的 provider-side write 如何执行？
decisions.answer: 必须由 provider-specific GitLab Branch/Commit/Merge Request API 创建；目标分支严格取显式 release_window.base_branch，禁止 git push、gh 或分支推断。
decisions.note: adapter 输出低成本 endpoint/payload 摘要与 MR lifecycle evidence，支持回放和审计。

decisions.q: GitLab draft-MR 的文件 scope 如何固定？
decisions.answer: 只允许一个 repository-relative draft 文件，默认 docs/release-notes-draft.md；拒绝额外文件、绝对路径、路径穿越及 source MR 文件。
decisions.note: Commit API actions 必须恰好覆盖该文件，adapter 在任何 provider write 前 fail-closed。

decisions.q: GitLab draft-MR 的生命周期属性是什么？
decisions.answer: 始终以 Draft 状态创建，remove_source_branch=false，禁止 auto-merge；branch 使用确定性 automated/changelog-drafter-gitlab-<window-hash>，由独立 closeout 节点负责清理。
decisions.note: draft-MR 是可审阅 artifact，不代表合并或发布完成。

decisions.q: GitLab Changelog Drafter 是否创建 carrier Issue？
decisions.answer: 是，但仅显式 draft-MR 路径创建一个独立且可去重的 carrier Issue；默认 draft-evidence 不创建 Issue。
decisions.note: carrier 绑定 draft request、draft-MR、human merge 和 closeout；避免把 artifact completion 当作发布完成。

decisions.q: Changelog Drafter carrier 使用什么协议？
decisions.answer: 使用 Changelog Drafter 专属结构化 schema（zj-loop.changelog_draft_request.v1）；复用 GitLab lifecycle 的 dedupe、claim、reread 原语，但不复用 issue-fix-request schema。
decisions.note: draft-consumer 与 fix-runner 保持语义分离。

decisions.q: GitLab Changelog draft-MR 何时允许 provider write？
decisions.answer: 必须先成功 claim 专属 Changelog carrier；claim、request、project、release_window.base_branch 或 source binding 任一失败时，零次 branch/commit/MR API 写入并输出结构化 hard stop。
decisions.note: claim 是唯一消费权，provider write 只能发生在 verifier-backed claim 之后。

decisions.q: GitLab Changelog Drafter dogfood 的 draft 文件放在哪里？
decisions.answer: 使用 ai-studio 的专用 zj-loop/dogfood/changelog-draft.md 单文件 fixture，不修改业务目录或真实 README/CHANGELOG。
decisions.note: draft-MR 只验证 Commit/MR/closeout API，fixture 可回滚且不代表业务文件变更。

decisions.q: GitLab Changelog Drafter artifact 保存什么？
decisions.answer: 只保存低成本审计字段与生成结果，包括 request id、repo、base/since/until refs、draft mode、file scope 和 provider operation summary；不保存完整 GitLab response、token 或敏感 payload。
decisions.note: 保持可回放、低成本、低泄露面的 evidence contract。

decisions.q: GitLab Changelog Drafter 的 truth 如何分层？
decisions.answer: orchestration review artifact 是主 truth；draft-MR body 只承载 post-merge contract 与简短摘要，不承载完整 draft 内容或 provider response。
decisions.note: 保持 Codex Harness/Doctor 可回放，同时让 MR body 面向 human review 与 closeout。

decisions.q: GitLab Changelog Drafter 的实现顺序是什么？
decisions.answer: 按 core adapter、CLI、GitLab fragment、ai-studio draft fixture dogfood、human merge closeout 的顺序执行 TDD。
decisions.note: 每个 slice 单独验证；draft-evidence、draft-MR、closeout 不互相冒充完成。

1-5-4-6.notes: Completed the full GitLab Changelog Drafter evidence chain: provider-specific carrier/claim/Commit/MR/closeout adapters; explicit draft-evidence and draft-MR CLI modes; generated fragment and bundle gates; real ai-studio artifact-only evidence; real Draft MR creation; human merge; negative merge-not-confirmed boundary; and positive closeout with reread evidence, branch cleanup, and carrier closure. The default remains draft-evidence; draft-MR and closeout retain separate explicit confirmations.

1-3-2-1.label: Workspace Route Decision local carrier and evidence-store adapter
1-3-2-1.notes: Implemented Workspace Route Decision adapter for provider:none signals. Dispatcher deterministically writes a local activation request under zj-loop/requests and low-cost route-decision evidence under zj-loop/evidence/route-decisions, then remains planned until the separate branch/patch review executor exists. TDD regression covers carrier and evidence persistence (core npm test: 194 passing).

1-3-2-2.label: Workspace branch patch and changed-file review-artifact executor
1-3-2-2.notes: Implemented Workspace review executor for provider:none dispatch execution. It snapshots current Git branch/HEAD plus tracked and untracked code changes into a binary patch and changed-file manifest under zj-loop/reviews, without creating branches, commits, or product-file writes. A clean workspace returns workspace-no-changes hard stop. TDD covers both paths (core npm test: 196 passing).

1-3-3-1.label: Workspace local closeout archive and resume runtime
1-3-3-1.notes: Added zj-loop-workspace-closeout runtime and CLI. It requires a local review manifest, stays resumable until ACCEPT_LOCAL_REVIEW_ARTIFACT, then archives only the local activation carrier and records idempotent closeout evidence. It never deletes Git refs or product files. TDD covers resumable, completed, and repeated paths (core npm test: 197 passing).

1-3-3-2.label: Workspace control CI and dependency route reference dogfood
1-3-3-2.notes: Dogfooded Workspace control/report plus CI Sweeper and Dependency Sweeper in real temporary Git worktrees. Control routes write local report evidence without code diffs; CI and dependency routes produce current-branch binary patch and changed-file review artifacts. Regression coverage runs through public dispatch (core npm test: 201 passing).

1-3-3-3.label: Workspace changelog and roadmap route reference dogfood
1-3-3-3.notes: Dogfooded Workspace Changelog Drafter and Roadmap-Sliced Development in real temporary Git worktrees. Changelog defaults to draft evidence and requires explicit workspace_draft_mode:file-patch for file review; roadmap produces Git patch/changed-file artifacts. The durable reference documents all applicable Workspace route families and explicit N/A tracker routes (core npm test: 201 passing).

1-5-3-1-1.label: Provider-neutral schedule-health result contract
1-5-3-1-1.notes: Added zj-loop.schedule_health.v1 contract with deterministic not_due, execution_missing, artifact validation, explicit target fields, low-cost audit data, and next_steps. Contract tests pass.

1-5-3-1-2.label: GitLab schedule API adapter and zj-loop-doctor CLI
1-5-3-1-2.notes: GitLab read-only schedule/pipeline adapter and explicit doctor CLI parameters implemented; missing token returns structured escalation.

1-5-3-1-3.label: Scheduled job artifact schema verifier and deterministic tests
1-5-3-1-3.notes: Explicit job/artifact/schema lookup and JSON schema verification implemented with deterministic contract tests.

1-5-3-1-4.label: GitLab generated-fragment YAML parser gate and target rollout recovery

decisions.q: GitLab fragment YAML parser gate 应放在哪些层？
decisions.answer: zj-loop-init 标准测试与根仓库 generated-bundle/release gate 两层都要
decisions.note: 源模板快速失败，发布资产再次验证，防止 bundle drift。

decisions.q: 本地确定性 YAML parser gate 应采用什么证据标准？
decisions.answer: Node yaml parser 验证 init 实际渲染的每个 fragment；GitLab pipeline 作为 target dogfood 第二层证据
decisions.note: 不依赖网络/token；只校验渲染产物，服务端差异由真实 target pipeline 捕获。

decisions.q: target project rollout recovery 的默认动作是什么？
decisions.answer: 使用本地 tarball 执行 init upgrade gitlab-ci force，保留 bak，提交前运行 parser gate，根 CI 仅显式最小变更
decisions.note: 证明用户升级路径；不手工伪造 fragments，不接管 Dejavu 等 root CI 配置。

decisions.q: YAML recovery 的 target dogfood 成功标准是否要求所有 generated manual jobs 成功？
decisions.answer: 只要求完整 include 被 GitLab 解析并创建 pipeline，yaml_errors 为空
decisions.note: consumer 运行时/route artifact 属于后续 live-evidence slice，避免混淆根因。

decisions.q: 自管 root GitLab CI 缺少 include/stage 时，是否让 init 标准 parser gate 硬失败？
decisions.answer: 不硬失败；输出 root_ci_integration_missing warning 与 next steps
decisions.note: Root CI 属于用户/平台；新建 root 由 bundle test 覆盖，target rollout 通过显式人审检查 include/stage。

1-5-3-1-4.notes: Completed deterministic two-layer YAML gate: init parses each rendered GitLab fragment; generated-bundle gate parses canonical and bundled fragments with default and controlled runner tags, and rejects bundle drift. Verified npm test (zj-loop-init, 32/32), npm run test:generated-bundle-release-gate, npm run check:zj-loop-init, and git diff --check.

1-5-3-1-5.label: GitLab target scheduled live evidence and escalation record

decisions.q: schedule-health 的真实运行窗口应以什么时间为准？
decisions.answer: 采用由 cron 推导的最近一次应执行窗口，加固定 10 分钟 grace；scheduled pipeline 必须晚于该窗口与 schedule.updated_at。
decisions.note: GitLab next_run_at 在一次运行后会前移到未来，不能作为成功窗口的唯一依据。

1-5-3-1-5.notes: Read-only GitLab configuration evidence checked 2026-07-15: schedule 957 is active, cron is 0 9 * * * Asia/Shanghai, next_run_at is 2026-07-16T09:03:00+08:00, and no source=schedule pipeline exists yet. This is not_due under the fixed 10-minute grace; do not classify it as a scheduler failure. GitLab project settings provide GITLAB_TOKEN to CI jobs, not to the local Codex shell. GitLab master pipeline 10496862 was created successfully with status manual after the YAML recovery, which confirms the full include parses; it is source=api and is not scheduled live evidence. Recheck after the due window for a source=schedule pipeline and issue-recommendations.json schema evidence.

1-5-3-1-5-1.label: Cron-derived scheduled execution window contract and regression tests

decisions.q: Cron-derived schedule window 应如何解析？
decisions.answer: 使用成熟的 timezone-aware cron parser，作为 @jununfly/zj-loop-core 的运行时依赖。
decisions.note: schedule-health 是通用协议；必须可靠支持 weekday、step、range 等常见 GitLab cron，而不是只覆盖当前固定每日 cron。

decisions.q: 已有有效 scheduled evidence、但下一个 cron 尚未到期时，doctor 应报告什么状态？
decisions.answer: 报告 healthy，并携带下一次 expected window；not_due 仅用于 schedule 创建或更新后首个窗口尚未到来。
decisions.note: 避免将持续健康的 schedule 表示为未验证状态，同时保留首次配置等待期的静默语义。

1-5-3-1-5-2.label: Temporary owned GitLab schedule evidence and guarded cleanup

decisions.q: 临时真实 scheduled evidence 应如何触发？
decisions.answer: 临时改为当前时刻约 3 分钟后的精确单分钟 cron；检测到首个 source=schedule pipeline 后立即恢复每日 09:00 Asia/Shanghai。
decisions.note: 避免 */1 重复执行 report-only triage、生成冗余 artifact 与审计噪声。

decisions.q: 临时 schedule 的恢复是否应防止覆盖并发人为修改？
decisions.answer: 必须保存原始 cron、timezone、ref、active 等低成本字段；恢复前重新读取并确认仍是本次写入的临时 cron，否则拒绝覆盖并输出结构化 recovery/escalation evidence。
decisions.note: 临时验证不能接管用户的 schedule 配置；compare-before-restore 保留人为配置的最终控制权。

decisions.q: 临时 cron 在什么时点恢复日常配置？
decisions.answer: 检测到首个 source=schedule pipeline 创建后立即受保护恢复，不等待 job/artifact 成功；随后单独验证 job 与 artifact。若 grace 后仍无 scheduled pipeline，也立即尝试受保护恢复并记录 execution_missing。
decisions.note: 限制临时 cron 的重复执行；执行与 artifact 失败仍保留为独立、可回放的诊断事实。

decisions.q: 临时 schedule 验证应由哪个接口执行？
decisions.answer: 新增独立 zj-loop-schedule-probe CLI，仍放在 @jununfly/zj-loop-core；它执行临时 cron、观察、compare-before-restore 与结构化证据。
decisions.note: Doctor 保持只读；确定性 operator CLI 取代人工 API 拼接，并要求固定确认短语、显式项目/schedule 参数和环境变量凭据。

decisions.q: 临时 schedule probe 是否允许任意 cron 写入？
decisions.answer: 不允许；仅接受必填 --due-in-minutes <N>，范围 3–30 分钟，并由 CLI 生成精确单分钟 cron。
decisions.note: 把它限定为 evidence probe，避免演化为可误用的通用 schedule 配置工具。

decisions.q: 临时 schedule probe 的写入确认如何保护？
decisions.answer: 使用固定确认短语 RUN_TEMPORARY_GITLAB_SCHEDULE_PROBE；缺失或不匹配时只输出结构化 refusal，零 API 写入。
decisions.note: 短语与唯一的 schedule mutation 边界一一对应，并形成可审计授权事实。

decisions.q: 临时 cron 写入后若 CLI 中断，应如何恢复？
decisions.answer: 必须在 zj-loop/ 下保存低成本 probe state，并支持确定性的 --resume 与受保护 --restore。state 仅保存 probe id、目标、原始/临时配置摘要、写入时间与恢复状态。
decisions.note: 重启后不依赖记忆或人工猜测，可继续观察或先安全恢复，避免遗留测试 schedule。

decisions.q: probe 在首次固定确认后，恢复日常 cron 是否需要第二次确认？
decisions.answer: 不需要；--resume 在观察到首个 scheduled pipeline 或超时后自动执行 compare-before-restore。
decisions.note: 首次确认授权有界 probe 事务；恢复是必需清理而非新的任意配置修改。compare-before-restore 失败时停止并输出 escalation。

decisions.q: zj-loop-schedule-probe start 的默认执行模型是什么？
decisions.answer: 在同一进程内每 30 秒轮询，直到出现 scheduled pipeline 或达到目标 minute 加固定 10 分钟 grace；完成自动恢复后才返回。
decisions.note: 提供完整 loop；仅进程中断或临时网络故障等异常情况需要 --resume。

decisions.q: GitLab 项目变量中的 GITLAB_TOKEN 如何进入 schedule probe？
decisions.answer: 在 GitLab CI bundle 新增手动 zj_loop_schedule_probe job，调用同一个 core CLI；本地 CLI 保留给已有允许环境变量的场景。
decisions.note: 核心协议与逻辑只实现一次；GitLab adapter 仅提供项目变量运行环境，不放宽仅环境变量认证契约。

decisions.q: GitLab 手动 schedule probe job 的授权输入如何提供？
decisions.answer: 必须在启动时显式填写 ZJ_LOOP_SCHEDULE_PROBE_DUE_IN_MINUTES=3 和 ZJ_LOOP_SCHEDULE_PROBE_CONFIRMATION=RUN_TEMPORARY_GITLAB_SCHEDULE_PROBE；模板默认留空。
decisions.note: 缺失时 CLI 输出结构化 refusal，零 schedule 写入，避免 YAML 默认值绕过确认边界。

decisions.q: 临时真实 schedule evidence 是否修改既有 schedule 957？
decisions.answer: 不修改；创建带固定 ZJ Loop marker 的一次性临时 GitLab schedule，验证后仅删除该 probe 自己创建的 schedule。
decisions.note: GitLab schedule update 没有已确认的原子 conditional-update 合约；独立 schedule 消除覆盖人为配置的竞争风险，并使中断恢复只需删除持有的 schedule id。

decisions.q: 自动 cleanup 删除临时 schedule 前需要哪些身份保护？
decisions.answer: 必须重新读取 schedule id，并验证固定 marker、probe id、ref、cron/timezone 与 state 一致；任一不一致或资源不存在都拒绝删除并输出 escalation。
decisions.note: 持有 id 不是充分授权；probe 只能删除可证明由自身创建且状态未漂移的 schedule。

decisions.q: 在进入目标 GitLab rollout 前，是否先收口本地 probe operator？
decisions.answer: 先完成 signal-safe CLI、CLI integration tests 与 bundle gate，再进入 target-project tarball rollout。
decisions.note: 真实项目只使用完整、可取消、可回放的 operator，不承担尚未完成的核心安全语义。

1-5-3-1-5-1-1.label: Timezone-aware cron expected-window evaluator and status regression suite
1-5-3-1-5-1-1.notes: Added cron-parser runtime dependency and timezone-aware cron evaluator. schedule-health now derives the post-update execution window from cron, reports healthy with the next window after valid evidence, and rejects stale scheduled pipelines. Verified core npm test (217 tests) and git diff --check.

1-5-3-1-5-1-2.label: Doctor schedule-health replay output and complete next-step commands
1-5-3-1-5-1-2.notes: Completed replay output hardening: self-hosted GitLab API URLs and explicit expected-within-minutes overrides are preserved in structured next-step command arrays; doctor exposes validated --expected-within-minutes. Verified core npm test (217 tests) and git diff --check.

1-5-3-1-5-2-1.label: Owned GitLab schedule probe lifecycle state and guarded cleanup

decisions.q: 轮询期间 GitLab API 临时失败时如何处理？
decisions.answer: 继续每 30 秒有界重试直到 deadline，记录低成本错误计数；仅在 deadline 后 cleanup 并输出 escalation。
decisions.note: 一次网络/API 抖动不应中断真实 scheduled evidence 观察；deadline 与 guarded cleanup 防止无限循环和临时 schedule 残留。

decisions.q: resume 是否可重新计算或延长 probe 观察窗口？
decisions.answer: 必须复用 state 中原始 armed_at 与 deadline，绝不重新计算或延长；deadline 已过则直接 guarded cleanup 并返回原窗口的 escalation/evidence。
decisions.note: resume 仅恢复同一次有界事务，不能把中断变成无限等待。

decisions.q: restore 的资源身份如何限定？
decisions.answer: 只接受 --probe-id，从 zj-loop/schedule-probes/<id>.json 读取 owned schedule 身份；没有 state、marker 不匹配或 state 已 cleaned 都拒绝，绝不接受任意 --schedule-id。
decisions.note: restore 保持为清理自身资源的专用接口，不成为通用 GitLab schedule 删除工具。

decisions.q: guarded cleanup 成功后如何处理 probe state？
decisions.answer: 保留 state 文件并标记为 cleaned，作为低成本 replay evidence；restore 看到 cleaned 时幂等拒绝，不再 DELETE。
decisions.note: 保留创建、观察、cleanup 的完整闭环证据，同时阻止重复清理。

1-5-3-1-5-2-1.notes: Implemented bounded owned-schedule lifecycle, persisted replay state, guarded identity cleanup, cancellation-safe runner behavior, and CLI SIGINT/SIGTERM cleanup with 130/143 semantics. Verified by core integration tests.

1-5-3-1-5-2-2.label: GitLab manual schedule probe fragment and generated-bundle gates

decisions.q: GitLab schedule probe job 的默认安装与触发边界是什么？
decisions.answer: 作为 bundle 默认安装的独立 manual job，仅允许 web pipeline 手动执行，不走 Route Decision 或 consumer dispatch。
decisions.note: 它是受控 provider-operator；避免 Daily Triage 或 schedule 自触发 probe 形成递归 loop。

decisions.q: GitLab schedule probe manual job 应保留哪些 artifact？
decisions.answer: 固定上传 schedule-probe-result.json 与 zj-loop/schedule-probes/*.json，保留 7 天。
decisions.note: 前者给出本次结果，后者保存 owned schedule 身份、deadline 与 cleanup outcome；足够回放且不含 token 或完整 provider response。

decisions.q: GitLab schedule probe manual job 的 timeout 应如何设置？
decisions.answer: 显式设定 timeout: 45m，覆盖最大 30m 延迟、10m grace 与 cleanup 余量。
decisions.note: 不依赖目标项目默认 timeout，保证有界 probe 有机会完成 guarded cleanup。

decisions.q: manual job 被取消或 runner 终止时如何降低临时 schedule 残留？
decisions.answer: CLI 必须处理 SIGINT/SIGTERM：写入当前 probe state 后立即尝试同一 guarded cleanup；若失败，保留 state 供 restore --probe-id 恢复。
decisions.note: 不能依赖 GitLab after_script 的取消语义；CLI signal handler 是可确定实现的第一道清理路径。

decisions.q: SIGINT/SIGTERM 后 cleanup 成功时 CLI 应如何退出？
decisions.answer: 仍以取消语义退出：SIGINT 为 130、SIGTERM 为 143；结构化 state/result 标记 cleanup_outcome: cleaned。
decisions.note: 资源清理成功不等于 probe 成功；保留取消退出码让 GitLab pipeline 如实呈现中断，同时 evidence 证明未遗留 owned schedule。

1-5-3-1-5-2-2.notes: Added the manual GitLab schedule-probe fragment, root include, init rendering support, and generated-bundle parser coverage. Verified by zj-loop-init tests and generated-bundle release gate.

1-5-3-1-5-2-3.label: Target-project tarball rollout and owned scheduled artifact evidence

decisions.q: Probe CLI reports escalation but GitLab job is success
decisions.answer: Treat this as a follow-up defect: scheduled-pipeline-missing must propagate a nonzero process exit or explicit workflow health failure after artifact upload.
decisions.note: The live artifact proved the current CLI exits 0 for an escalated result, which obscures the missing evidence in GitLab job status. Keep the artifact and guarded cleanup behavior, but add a deterministic failure mapping before accepting scheduled live evidence as complete.

decisions.q: 手动触发的 owned schedule probe 默认应指向哪个 ref？
decisions.answer: 默认使用 CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME；检查默认分支长期调度健康时，才显式传 --ref "$CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH"。
decisions.note: 测试分支的安装验证与默认分支生产健康是两类证据。默认跟随当前 job ref 才能验证刚部署的 CI bundle，不再隐式把临时 schedule 固定到默认分支。

decisions.q: probe 已上传 artifact 但结果为 escalated 时，CI 应如何退出？
decisions.answer: 使用固定 exit 2；completed 为 0，refused/usage error 为 1，SIGINT 为 130，SIGTERM 为 143。
decisions.note: 让 GitLab job 状态与结构化 result 一致，同时保留 130/143 的取消语义，避免把 escalation 误显示为成功。

decisions.q: owned schedule 与 scheduled pipeline 的归属如何做到无歧义？
decisions.answer: 以 owned_schedule_id 的 schedule detail 中 last_pipeline.id 为唯一锚点；再验证 pipeline.source=schedule、pipeline.ref=temporary_schedule.ref、pipeline.created_at>=armed_at。任何缺失或不一致均 escalation、上传 artifact、exit 2 并 guarded cleanup。
decisions.note: 不使用基于 source/ref/time 的候选匹配 fallback。模板默认传 CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME，默认分支健康检查才显式传 CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH。

decisions.q: owned probe 成功是否必须验证 scheduled pipeline 内的 receipt artifact？
decisions.answer: 必须。成功链路固定为 owned schedule -> exact last_pipeline.id -> source=schedule pipeline -> 专属 receipt job -> schedule-probe-receipt.json -> probe 校验 -> guarded cleanup。
decisions.note: 创建 schedule 时注入唯一 ZJ_LOOP_SCHEDULE_PROBE_ID；receipt artifact 回显 probe_id、pipeline id、ref 与 schema。仅创建 pipeline 或候选匹配都不能作为成功证据。

decisions.q: receipt job 的自动触发与副作用边界是什么？
decisions.answer: 仅在 CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE=schedule 且 ZJ_LOOP_SCHEDULE_PROBE_ID 非空时自动运行；needs: []、allow_failure: false、短 timeout，使用 bundle 配置的 image/runner tags。
decisions.note: 它不进入 Route Decision、不消费 Issue Fix Request、不创建 schedule；只写 schedule-probe-receipt.json 与最小 replay state。普通 schedule（如 957）没有 probe id，因此完全不触发。

decisions.q: probe id 如何写入和验证，才能成为创建、receipt 与 cleanup 的共同身份？
decisions.answer: 创建 schedule 时原子写入 ZJ_LOOP_SCHEDULE_PROBE_ID=<probe-id>；创建后与 cleanup 前都重新读取并验证 marker、ref、cron、timezone、变量值完全一致。
decisions.note: 变量创建/回读不支持则 arm 失败；若资源已创建，仅在完整 identity 匹配时立即清理。任何漂移拒绝 DELETE 并 escalation。

decisions.q: receipt artifact 的最小硬 schema 是什么？
decisions.answer: 固定 zj-loop.gitlab_schedule_probe_receipt.v1，必含 probe_id、pipeline_id、project、ref、source=schedule。
decisions.note: probe 必须用 exact last_pipeline.id 定位 pipeline，再定位固定 job zj_loop_schedule_probe_receipt，下载 artifact 并逐字段验证；job、artifact、JSON、schema 或字段任一缺失/不一致均 exit 2 后 cleanup。

decisions.q: escalated exit 2 时如何避免 GitLab shell 吞掉结构化证据？
decisions.answer: fragment 必须以 set +e 运行 CLI、捕获 exit_code、恢复 set -e、cat schedule-probe-result.json，再以原 exit_code 退出；artifact 维持 when: always。
decisions.note: completed 保持 0；escalated 可见 result 后以 2 失败；SIGINT/SIGTERM 保持 130/143。这样 shell、job 状态与 artifact 的事实一致。

decisions.q: GitLab image 的通用默认与 ai-studio dogfood 应如何分层？
decisions.answer: 发布 bundle 继续默认 node:22；ai-studio dogfood 显式 pin hub.bilibili.co/nyx-compile/bilibili-nodejs-debian12@sha256:1d9b33a6a995d34ba57623a66f60c7564fbe41180bb53d49e82bc01770196290。
decisions.note: 通用默认保持跨项目可移植；target project 用 zj-loop-init --gitlab-image 传入自身可达镜像。Node 22.21.1 digest 避免 Docker Hub 不可达与 tag 漂移。

decisions.q: 定位到 owned last_pipeline 后，receipt job 的等待、失败与 cleanup 边界是什么？
decisions.answer: receipt success 且 artifact 校验通过立即 cleanup 并 completed；failed/canceled 立即 cleanup 后 escalated exit 2；pending/running/缺 artifact 每 30 秒轮询到原始 deadline，随后 cleanup escalated exit 2。
decisions.note: API 临时失败仅记录低成本计数并有界重试，不延长 deadline；cleanup 漂移或失败保留 state 并 escalated，不自动重试。pipeline、receipt、cleanup 组成同一有界事务。

decisions.q: What happens when GitLab cannot read schedule variables back?
decisions.answer: Treat the provider as schedule-probe capability blocked before schedule creation.
decisions.note: Schedule variable identity is mandatory. The deterministic preflight performs only GET requests and refuses with schedule-probe-capability-blocked plus no operations; it does not weaken identity or fall back to manual cleanup.

1-5-3-1-5-2-3-5.notes: 2026-07-15 ai-studio pinned-image dogfood: Web pipeline 10501751/job 25930669 created owned schedule 960, but schedule detail omitted variables and both variables endpoints returned 404; schedule fired but no source=schedule pipeline appeared. Human-session cleanup removed 960; normal schedule 957 remained unchanged. Follow-up implementation now performs a read-only preflight before any POST: it lists existing schedules then requires an existing schedule detail to expose variables as an array. This GitLab instance therefore returns blocked/schedule-probe-capability-blocked with operations=[] and CLI exit 2; no temporary schedule or cleanup is attempted. 1-5-4-3-7.label: Execution-ready CI Sweeper consumer claim verifier and repair MR boundary

decisions.q: 是否在完整 claim/verifier/repair-MR/human-merge/closeout evidence 通过前提升 ci-sweeper 为 execution-ready？
decisions.answer: 否，先实现并验证完整 consumer，证据闭环后再用固定确认短语提升
decisions.note: 实现完成不等于能力升级；保持 execution_ready=false，避免把代码存在误认为用户项目可自动修复。

decisions.q: CI Sweeper signal 与 consumer 是否共用同一个 job/workflow？
decisions.answer: 分离：signal 只创建 carrier，独立 consumer 只消费显式 request
decisions.note: 避免 signal 自消费、职责混淆和自动循环；scheduled recovery 只做确定性发现后传入显式身份。

decisions.q: CI Sweeper consumer 是否要求同时传入 issue_iid 与 request_id，并如何处理身份不一致？
decisions.answer: 必须同时传入并固定校验；缺失或不一致输出 request-source-mismatch，零次 API 写入
decisions.note: 固定 project、provider、consumer、request_id 与 Issue envelope 的绑定，禁止依赖标题、label 或最新 issue 猜测。

decisions.q: claim 是否必须位于所有只读 verifier 之后、任何仓库写入之前？
decisions.answer: 必须；route/readiness、身份、request schema、consumer/provider/project、verification allowlist、repair action gate 全部通过后才 claim
decisions.note: claim 是唯一消费权；verifier 失败不得留下无效 claim。claim 后再记录 running、执行 bounded repair，失败进入 terminal evidence。

decisions.q: claim 后 repair/API/gate 失败是否自动重试？
decisions.answer: 否；追加 terminal failed/escalation evidence，retry 必须创建新 Issue Fix Request
decisions.note: 同一 request 不反复消费；source branch/MR 做 dedupe，human merge 保持独立。

decisions.q: repair 失败或高风险时是否创建第二个 escalation issue？
decisions.answer: 默认不创建；原 Issue Fix Request 追加结构化 failed/escalation evidence，retry 使用新 request
decisions.note: 保持单一 carrier lifecycle truth，减少 issue 噪声；只有协议显式要求独立 escalation carrier 时才创建。

decisions.q: Issue Fix Request 创建后如何触发独立 consumer pipeline？
decisions.answer: 主路径由受控 API 立即触发并显式传入 issue_iid 与 request_id；scheduled recovery 只作漏触发补偿
decisions.note: consumer 不猜 issue；触发失败只记录 structured trigger evidence，不自动循环触发。

decisions.q: consumer pipeline 使用哪个 ref？
decisions.answer: 固定 CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH；repair MR target branch 也固定 CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
decisions.note: consumer 使用稳定主线代码；source branch 只作为 evidence，不参与运行时 ref 猜测。

decisions.q: consumer job 允许哪些 pipeline source？
decisions.answer: 仅 api、schedule、web；三者都必须显式传入 issue_iid 与 request_id，其他 source 不创建 consumer job
decisions.note: 避免普通业务 pipeline 自触发；缺失身份输出 request-source-mismatch，零次 API 写入。

decisions.q: scheduled recovery 如何扫描并派生消费目标？
decisions.answer: 有界 deterministic scan：只读 open Issue 中合法 requested、未 claim、consumer=ci-sweeper 的 envelope，固定排序与 max_requests=30，派生显式 issue_iid+request_id 后消费
decisions.note: 不依赖 label、不无限扫描、不重复触发；超限输出结构化 next_steps。

decisions.q: execution-ready dogfood 是否只允许修改 generated substrate，不触碰业务代码？
decisions.answer: 必须；只允许 zj-loop/ 与根 CI 生成物等 allowlisted scope，业务文件越界立即 hard stop
decisions.note: 验证 repair-MR 边界而不污染 ai-studio 业务逻辑；human merge 后再 closeout。

decisions.q: repair_actions 是否必须由 deterministic planner 写入 request envelope，consumer 是否禁止自行猜动作？
decisions.answer: 必须；planner 产生 allowlisted actions，consumer 只验证执行；缺失时 repair-actions-missing，零 claim/仓库写入/MR
decisions.note: LLM 不决定文件或动作；request envelope 是 repair authority。

decisions.q: 如何处理缺少 repair_actions 的 Issue #163？
decisions.answer: 保留为 negative boundary case，不编辑；新建带合法 repair_actions 的 request 做正向 dogfood
decisions.note: #163 验证 repair-actions-missing 的零写入边界；新 request 验证完整 claim/verifier/repair MR。

decisions.q: request-body 是否支持显式结构化 repair_actions 输入？
decisions.answer: 支持可选 --repair-actions <json>；不传保持普通 request，传入时在 carrier 生成前 deterministic 校验；不从自然语言推断
decisions.note: #163 保持 negative case；新 request 复用同一确定性入口做正向 repair-MR dogfood。

decisions.q: 正向 dogfood 使用什么 generated substrate fixture？
decisions.answer: 使用 zj-loop/dogfood/ci-sweeper-generated-substrate-fixture.yml 专用文件，只允许其 create/update/repair，不触碰业务代码和主 CI workflow
decisions.note: fixture 可控、可回滚，覆盖 action/path/scope/verifier/MR contract。

decisions.q: 正向 dogfood 的 repair_actions 是否固定为已有 fixture 的单个 update？
decisions.answer: 是，固定为对 zj-loop/dogfood/ci-sweeper-generated-substrate-fixture.yml 的 deterministic update
decisions.note: 验证真实 drift 修复，不验证无约束文件创建；content 必须进入 request envelope。
